name: What if no one saw my chemical exposure at work happen?

mainEntity.name: What if no one saw my chemical exposure at work happen?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Use surveillance, logs, medical tests, co-worker later statements, site photos.** Circumstantial evidence suffices[3]. **Key factors:** Chemical residue tests[2]. **Practical guidance:** Request employer footage/records immediately. Build timeline. **No witnesses ok with docs.**
